query:
INSERT INTO orders (
                customer_id,
                brand,
                model,
                vehicle,
                time_slot,
                subtotal,
                tax,
                surge_multiplier,
                total_price,
                latitude,
                longitude
            )
            VALUES (
                $1,$2,$3,$4::vehicle_category,$5,$6,$7,$8,$9,$10,$11
            )
            RETURNING id
